title: equisetum hyemale subsp. wilsonii
intro: Equisetum hyemale subsp. wilsonii, also known as the scouring rush, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the horsetail family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high silica content and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale subsp. wilsonii include its potential to support skin and joint health, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and improve digestion. Equisetum hyemale subsp. wilsonii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for use in herbal medicine.
